_note: NaN-boxing fully active (T4/T5 complete). VM stack/globals/collect_frames/emit_log all use NanVal (8 bytes). All opcode handlers migrated. tight_loop improvement reflects 8-byte NanVal vs ~40-byte VMValue enum on hot path.

comparison_vs_v20_2_0._note: NaN-boxing VM stack migration complete. tight_loop improved ~36% due to smaller value representation (8B vs ~40B) reducing allocation and cache pressure. record_transform improved ~21% due to RecordMap<String, NanVal> replacing HashMap<String, VMValue>.
